contracts.name: artifact token expiry boundary
contracts.proof: Artifact token reads succeed before expiry and reject at and after expiry.

contracts.name: artifact range edge cases
contracts.proof: Suffix and open-ended ranges resolve correctly; zero-byte and invalid ranges reject.

contracts.name: artifact content response headers
contracts.proof: 206 content asserts content type, disposition, nosniff, cache control, accept-ranges, content-range, and content-length.

contracts.name: concurrent duplicate action response
contracts.proof: Two simultaneously entered responders sharing one idempotency key produce exactly one effect and 202/200 responses.

contracts.name: malformed route IDs
contracts.proof: Malformed percent escapes in action, artifact, and session IDs map to the stable bad_request 400 response.

contracts.name: pending action expiry boundary
contracts.proof: Pending action response succeeds before expiry and durably expires at and after the boundary.
